name: Squarespace
description: Website and commerce platform with REST Commerce APIs to manage products, orders, customers, inventory and more.

auth_methods.note: Official docs state 'The Commerce APIs use OAuth and Developer API Keys' and require an Authorization: Bearer <token> header.

credential_access.note: Squarespace support docs explain where to generate Developer API keys in a site’s Settings > Advanced > Developer API keys and how to use them, but do not state whether generating/using working keys requires a paid plan vs. trial, or any partner/developer approval constraints.

api_surface.note: Commerce APIs docs state 'The Commerce APIs are REST APIs' and list endpoints for products, orders, customers, fulfillment, subscriptions, inventory, etc.

buildability.note: Docs show you can generate Developer API Keys from a Squarespace site dashboard (Settings > Advanced > Developer API Keys) and use them as Bearer tokens, but the official public docs reviewed do not clarify whether a paid plan/trial status or partner approval is required to obtain working credentials.

queries: Squarespace developer API documentation site:developers.squarespace.com API authentication how to obtain API credentials Squarespace REST API developer docs
